To install or remove components at your current Google Cloud CLI version [570.0.0], run:
  $ gcloud components install COMPONENT_ID
  $ gcloud components remove COMPONENT_ID

To update your Google Cloud CLI installation to the latest version [570.0.0], run:
  $ gcloud components update
